name: Vicinity Centres
analysis: VCX has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$2.5374. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$2.5429 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$2.5374, stop A$2.3760, target A$2.5563. Risk/reward is 0.12:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
